2024-07-20T18:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department reminded members of the public that to facilitate the drone show to be held in Tsim Sha Tsui East at 7.30 pm tonight (20 July 2024), roads in Tsim Sha Tsui have been temporarily closed to all vehicular traffic. Motorists are advised to avoid driving to the areas affected by the road closures. In case of traffic congestion, motorists are urged to exercise care and patience and follow the instructions from the Police on site.
2024-07-20T18:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署提醒市民，為配合今天（2024年7月20日）晚上7時30分在尖沙咀東舉行的無人機表演，尖沙咀一帶的道路已臨時封閉，禁止所有車輛駛入。駕駛人士請避免駕車前往上述受道路封閉影響的地區。如遇交通擠塞，請駕駛人士保持小心忍讓，及遵從現場警務人員的指示。

2024-07-20T19:06:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to busy traffic at Yau Ma Tei, Jordan and Tsim Sha Tsui, citizens please take note KMB's service has been affected. Citizens please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services.
2024-07-20T19:06:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於油麻地、佐敦及尖沙咀一帶車多關係，市民請留意九巴的服務會受影響。市民請考慮使用其他公共交通服務，例如港鐵服務。

2024-07-20T22:02:00.CONTENT_EN: The service of KMB which was affected by busy traffic at Yau Ma Tei, Jordan and Tsim Sha Tsui is gradually resuming normal.
2024-07-20T22:02:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因油麻地、佐敦及尖沙咀一帶交通繁忙而受影響的九巴服務正陸續回復正常。

2024-07-21T06:46:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to baggage handling system equipment fault, In‐town Check‐in service at Hong Kong Station is temporarily suspended. MTR is handling the situation to resume the service as soon as possible. The In-Town Check-in service in Kowloon Station maintains normal operations. Passengers are advised to leave earlier for the Airport for baggage check-in.
2024-07-21T06:46:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於行李處理系統機件故障，機場快綫香港站市區預辦登機服務暫停，港鐵正在處理，以儘快恢復服務。 九龍站市區預辦登機服務維持正常運作。 乘客請提早前往機場辦理登機手續。

2024-07-21T09:55:00.CONTENT_EN: The equipment fault of baggage handling system in Hong Kong Station has been fixed. In-town Check-in service in Hong Kong Station is gradually resuming.
2024-07-21T09:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 經搶修後，香港站行李處理系統已恢復運作，機場快綫香港站市區預辦登機服務逐步回復正常。

2024-07-21T08:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to hoisting of Standby Signal No. 1 and the associated wet weather, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. pay attention to the special traffic and transport arrangements may be implemented; ii. pay attention to the possible traffic congestions of the roads; iii. plan the journey in advance; iv. allow more traveling time to cater for delay; v. drive with extra care and patience; and vi. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2024-07-21T08:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於一號戒備信號現正生效、天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.留意當局可能會實施特別的交通及運輸措施； ii.留意在個別道路可能會出現交通擠塞的情況； iii.提早計劃行程路線； iv.預留充裕時間出門； v.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 vi.特别留意視線受阻的交通繁忙路口。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: No train service between Prince Edward and Ho Man Tin on the Kwun Tong Line on 28 July
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 7月28日觀塘綫太子至何文田列車服務暫停

2024-07-21T12:00:00.CONTENT_EN: There will be no train service between Prince Edward and Ho Man Tin on the Kwun Tong Line on Sunday 28 July to facilitate large-scale tunnel asset renewal work. Please plan your journeys using alternative routes. More passengers than usual are expected in Prince Edward on that day. This may result in a longer waiting time on platforms or for station facilities; Exit C of Yau Ma Tei will also be temporarily closed, please use other exits.
2024-07-21T12:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 配合隧道大型資產更新工程，於7月28日(星期日)，觀塘綫來往太子至何文田的列車服務暫停，請預早規劃行程及使用替代路綫。 預計當天太子站乘客較多，候車及等候使用站內設施時間或會較長；油麻地站C出入口亦會暫時關閉，請使用其他出入口。
